summary: Follow Recommendation feature testing complete. All 8 core features tested and passed: button appears in NextBestDirectionSection, clicking prefills action input, scrolls to Action Evaluation section, focuses input, recommendation indicator banner appears with correct Hebrew text, direction badge shows, X button clears indicator, and indicator clears after evaluation. RTL Hebrew layout maintained throughout.
critical_code_review_comments: GOOD: handleFollowRecommendation in PhilosDashboard.js correctly passes recommendation metadata including direction, reason, strength, and insight
GOOD: ActionEvaluationSection.js has proper data-testid attributes: recommendation-indicator, clear-recommendation-btn
GOOD: evaluateAction in usePhilosState.js correctly validates recommendationMetadata with followed_recommendation flag before spreading into history entry
GOOD: RTL layout properly implemented with dir='rtl' attribute on both NextBestDirectionSection and recommendation-indicator
GOOD: Direction badge correctly maps recommendation_direction to Hebrew labels (תרומה, התאוששות, סדר, נזק, הימנעות)
seed_data_creation: Created test decisions via UI (help a colleague, organize tasks, take a short walk) to trigger NextBestDirectionSection display and test Follow Recommendation flow
context_for_next_testing_agent: Follow Recommendation flow: 1) NextBestDirectionSection appears when user has history, 2) Button 'פעל לפי ההמלצה' triggers handleFollowRecommendation which sets recommendationMetadata and prefills actionText, 3) Scrolls to action input and focuses, 4) ActionEvaluationSection shows recommendation indicator when recommendationMetadata exists, 5) Indicator has 'הפעולה הזו נובעת מהכיוון המומלץ' text + direction badge, 6) X button calls onClearRecommendation, 7) evaluateActionWithRecommendation passes metadata to evaluateAction and clears recommendationMetadata after.

frontend_tests.test: Button 'פעל לפי ההמלצה' appears in NextBestDirectionSection
frontend_tests.details: Button found with data-testid='follow-recommendation-btn' and correct Hebrew text

frontend_tests.test: Clicking button prefills action input with recommendation text
frontend_tests.details: Action input value changed to recommendation text (e.g., 'הפסקה קצרה ומודעת')

frontend_tests.test: Page scrolls to Action Evaluation section
frontend_tests.details: ScrollIntoView behavior observed with smooth scroll

frontend_tests.test: Banner shows 'הפעולה הזו נובעת מהכיוון המומלץ' text

frontend_tests.details: Direction badge shows correct Hebrew label based on recommendation_direction
Clicking clear-recommendation-btn removes indicator from DOM
After clicking Evaluate Decision, indicator no longer present
dir='rtl' attribute on NextBestDirectionSection and recommendation-indicator confirmed
